content: Startup MVP (HingeX Social Connector MVP1): core loop = Find → Signal → Consent → Connect. Minimal profile (2–3 photos + quote + activity). Discovery requires being out + moving; nearby proximity ~1 mile; match window expires in 24h; chat unlocks only on mutual match. Trust: work-email verification badge (MVP1-lite), optional verified-only filter. Vibe Map ships simulated for investor demo; real user-powered density map deferred to Phase II. Non-goals: couch-swiping browse feed, exact location sharing, venue integrations (Yelp/Resy/OpenTable), heavy ML matching, real-time websockets/H3 gamification.
tags: type:decision, type:context, domain:product, source:user, status:active, confidence:high

content: Created skill 'work-decision-coach' (big-tech generic) to coach high-stakes work decisions with 80% execution + 20% politics literacy. Outputs: fastest safe move, 80/20 breakdown, stakeholder/incentive map, pre-wire plan + message drafts, positive influence plan, and ALWAYS a paste-ready brag-log entry. References include templates.md, operating_model.md (weekly/biweekly/monthly/quarterly cadence), and microsoft_ops_template.md (blank fill-in for Microsoft-specific norms; remind Desi to fill).
tags: type:pattern, domain:career, domain:ai, skill:general, status:active, source:user, confidence:high

content: Work-decision-coach prompt template: Situation; Decision; Options A/B/C; Deadline; Reversible + rollback; Customer impact; Stakeholders (roles only: sponsor/blockers/approvers/gets blamed); Risks; What you want. Shortcut prompt: 'Use work-decision-coach on this: … Deadline … Stakeholders …'. Output always includes: fastest safe move, 80/20 breakdown, pre-wire plan + 1-liners, positive influence plan, message drafts, and a paste-ready brag-log entry.
tags: type:pattern, domain:career, domain:ai, skill:general, status:active, source:user, confidence:high

content: Scheduling rule: When creating cron reminders/check-ins, avoid collisions by default—always use an offset time (e.g., 3:17pm instead of 3:00pm). When offering schedule choices, prefer offset suggestions and remember to apply offsets consistently.
tags: type:pattern, domain:ops, skill:general, confidence:high, status:active, source:user

content: Alo hat cleaning guide saved at workspace/notes/alo-clean-how-to.md. Hat is 100% cotton shell, 100% polyester lining. Clean drywall dust: dry brush first, then barely damp microfiber cloth with light dabbing. Use tiny drop of dish soap if residue remains. Air dry on a bowl/towel to hold shape. No washing machine, no bleach, no direct heat on polyester. Brim shaping: steam over kettle 10-15 sec then curve and hold (cotton responds well). Rubber band trick to hold curve overnight.
tags: type:pattern, domain:ops, skill:general, source:user, confidence:high, status:active

content: Kettlebell purchase research saved at workspace/notes/kettlebell-alternatives.md. Desi looking for rubber-coated 9-10lb kettlebell cheaper than Nike (2). Top picks: Yes4All neoprene coated ~6 (amazon.com/dp/B0CTM9XW5R), Rep Fitness ~2 (repfitness.com/products/kettlebells-lb), Rogue rubber coated ~5-40 (roguefitness.com). Reddit favorites: Lifeline and Rep Fitness for mid-tier budget.
tags: type:research, domain:ops, status:exploring, source:research, confidence:high

content: Forearm/wrist rehab guide saved at workspace/notes/wrist-forearm-rehab.md. Desi has a hurt forearm. Tool: Ethos Adjustable Grip Trainer (Dick's). Rehab sequence: 1) Rest+ice 2) Wrist flexion/extension with band 3) Reverse wrist curls 4) Grip trainer at low resistance. Avoid grip trainer if tennis/golfer's elbow — aggravates tendons. No pain = safe to load.
tags: type:pattern, domain:ops, skill:general, source:user, status:active, confidence:high
